name: Kubernetes Pod OOMKilled in recommendation-engine
description: Kubernetes pod is repeatedly OOMKilled due to memory limits violation.
expected_diagnosis: Recommendation engine pods are failing with OOMKilled code 137 due to low configured memory limits.

alert_payload.details: Kubernetes Event: Container 'recommendation-engine' in pod 'recommendation-engine-pod-7f8b' terminated with exit code 137 (OOMKilled).
